course_title: SURVEY OF 19TH AND 20TH CENTURY RUSSIAN LITERATURE IN TRANSLATION I
description: Examines the era of 19th-century Russian prose fiction, roughly 1830-1900, from Aleksandr Pushkin to Anton Chekhov. More writing intensive thanLITTRANS 201.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Not open to students with credit forLITTRANS 201
